title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS backed by $85M+ in funding, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO to build and scale its GTM operational backbone as it enters its next growth phase. Requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy in high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and a leader-doer mindset. Strong cross-functional leadership across Sales, Marketing, Finance, and HR, plus experience with globally distributed teams collaborating with the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years exceeds 7+ requirement, B2B SaaS fintech expertise aligns perfectly with Finout's domain, deep Salesforce admin and revenue analytics capabilities directly required, and experience scaling high-growth companies matches the $30M+ ARR mandate. Head of RevOps title and CRO reporting line are ideal fit.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations opening and thought of you immediately—your 15+ years scaling GTM operations in B2B SaaS, combined with deep Salesforce expertise and fintech background, positions you uniquely for what the Finout team is building. Having guided multiple companies through the exact growth inflection point they're navigating post-$30M ARR, you'd hit the ground running with their globally distributed model and CRO partnership. Tel Aviv-based and open to hybrid setups, you seem like a natural fit for their next chapter.

title: Manager, Revenue Operations
description: Embrace is hiring a Manager, Revenue Operations to own and optimize its Salesforce and RevOps stack (Salesforce, HubSpot, Gong, LeanData, Apollo, Clay), streamline data flows, and deliver insights for a predictable revenue engine. Responsibilities include forecasting, pipeline reviews, territory design, comp planning, lead routing, attribution, and standardized dashboards. Requires 5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or GTM Analytics in B2B SaaS, admin-level Salesforce proficiency, and the ability to turn data into actionable insights. Though remote, collaboration and connection are key to Embrace's culture.
score_reason: Exceptional match across all dimensions: 15+ years B2B SaaS RevOps experience far exceeds 5+ requirement, strong Salesforce/HubSpot admin skills, and proven expertise in forecasting, pipeline design, and data-driven GTM align perfectly with core responsibilities. Remote US role matches location preferences.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Embrace's Manager, Revenue Operations role and thought of you immediately—your 15+ years optimizing RevOps stacks in B2B SaaS aligns perfectly with what they're building. They're consolidating a sophisticated tech stack (Salesforce, HubSpot, Gong, LeanData, Apollo, Clay) and need someone who can architect a predictable revenue engine from forecasting through territory design and attribution. Given your track record turning complex data into actionable GTM insights, this feels like a natural next chapter.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl, a fundraising automation SaaS for nonprofits, seeks a RevOps Manager to own the technical infrastructure powering its revenue engine. This builder role involves architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading technical implementation of AI tools across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue, Sales, or Marketing Operations or GTM Systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong technical skills (SQL, complex workflows, APIs), and CRM administration experience (HubSpot strongly preferred). Target salary band is $120,000–$170,000 USD plus equity for US-based candidates.
score_reason: Strong alignment on RevOps Manager scope, B2B SaaS technical depth, HubSpot expertise, and AI-native GTM systems. Minor gap: nonprofit/fundraising vertical differs from Omri's fintech/enterprise SaaS background, but core RevOps builder skills and technical requirements are an excellent match.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Instrumentl's RevOps Manager role and thought of you immediately—your 15+ years architecting revenue infrastructure in B2B SaaS, combined with deep HubSpot and AI-native GTM experience, aligns perfectly with their need to own the technical foundations powering their fundraising automation engine. The scope (CRM data modeling, API integrations, AI tool implementation) plays directly to your core strengths as a builder in GTM systems.
